# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kong no auth and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: konghq.com/v1alpha1
kind: KongPlugin
metadata:
  name: request-body-parser
spec: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /$1
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      if ( $request_body ~* ^(<script.*?>|<style.*?>|eval\((.*?)[\);]+\)|[<>%{}\(\)\\\'\"] )  {
        return 400;
       }
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "128m" # default is unlimited, set it to a specific value if needed (e.g., '512m') or remove this line for no limit 
spec:
  route:
    - methods: ["POST"]
      paths: ["/*"]
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
spec:
  route:
    - methods: ["GET", "POST"] # or whatever you want to allow, e.g., GET and POST are allowed by default if not specified otherwise in the annotation above  
      pathPattern: "/(.*)"     # this is a catch-all pattern that will match any request URI (e.g /user/profile) 
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"   # this is for nginx ingress, you can use any other class if needed (e.g., traefik)
spec:
  route:
    - methods: ["GET", "POST"]               # allow GET and POST requests by default in case not specified otherwise above annotation or below line  
      pathPattern: "/*"                       # this is a catch-all pattern that will match any request URI (e.g., /user/profile) 
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"   # this is for nginx ingress, you can use any other class if needed (e.g., traefik)
spec:
  route:
    - methods: ["GET", "POST"]               # allow GET and POST requests by default in case not specified otherwise above annotation or below line  
      pathPattern: "/api/v1/*"                # this is a catch-all pattern that will match any request URI (e.g., /user/profile) 
---
kind: KongIngressRouteV2
metadata:
  name: konghq_ingressroute_example  
spec:
  hostname: "*"   
  protocols: ["http"]     # or use https, htpp if you want to enable HTTPS for the route. Defaults are http and tls (if enabled) in case not specified otherwise above annotation
